item.title: Founding ML/Data Scientist (Remote, UK), MyDataValue
item.guid: founding ml data scientist remote|uk mydatavalue
item.description: Job Title Founding ML/Data Scientist (Remote, UK) Job Description We're an AI-driven hospitality tech platform helping vacation rental owners automate their revenue on Booking.com and Airbnb. We sit on Booking.com private API data, Airbnb channel data, and scraped competitive pricing across thousands of properties — and right now we barely use it. Our agent is rules-based where it should be data-driven, and our promotions engine has no model behind it. We're looking for a founding ML/Data Scient

item.title: Founding Engineer, MyDataValue
item.description: Job Title Founding Engineer Job Description We're building the future of Revenue Management. AI agents that give short-term rental operators and independent hotels more money for less effort. We integrate directly with Booking.com, Airbnb, and PMS platforms via deep private API connections. The role : This is a flexible Hybrid role in London. You'll be the second engineering hire, working directly alongside Martin. Everything is on the table: backend systems, React frontend, Chrome extension, da

item.title: Senior Python Engineer, Fulfil
item.description: Job Title Senior Python Engineer Job Description About Fulfil Fulfil is the modern ERP for commerce. Built to power the fastest-growing eCommerce brands, our platform brings together order management, inventory, accounting, and more, turning complex operations into a strategic advantage. We’re trusted by brands like HexClad, Ridge Wallet, Caraway, and Resident, and backed by people who want to change the way merchant operations are run. We believe in deep work, radical accountability, and buildi

item.title: Founding ML/Data Scientist (Remote, UK)
item.description: Job Description Unique data — Booking.com private API data, Airbnb channel data, and scraped competitive pricing. This dataset doesn't exist at most companies. Real impact — your models drive revenue decisions for thousands of properties. High equity for our stage. A compounding moat — every property we add makes the data richer and the models better. Salary £70k–£100k · Equity 0.5%–1%. Restrictions Telecommuting is OK No Agencies Please Requirements A real data scientist who reaches for statist
item.location: Remote, Remote - London UK, United Kingdom

item.title: Founding Engineer
item.guid: founding engineer|martin dawson cto co founder
item.description: Job Description We're building the future of Revenue Management. AI agents that give short-term rental operators and independent hotels more money for less effort. We integrate directly with Booking.com , Airbnb, and PMS platforms via deep private API connections. The role: This is a flexible Hybrid role in London. You'll be the second engineering hire, working directly alongside Martin. Everything is on the table: backend systems, React frontend, Chrome extension, data pipelines, agent orchestr

item.title: Web Developer
item.description: The Web Developer (Django) is responsible for creating products and experiences that present Crossway content to the marketplace with truth, beauty, and excellence. This role will be primarily focused on web application development. Remote candidates are acceptable, though preference will be given to those who can meet periodically in Wheaton, IL. The Web Developer (Django) will meet on a regular basis with the Director of Web Development for the purpose of collaboration, reviewing progress, and

item.title: PyPI Sustainability Engineer
item.description: About the Role The Python Software Foundation is hiring a contract Sustainability Engineer, PyPI , reporting to the Director of Engineering. This role focuses on building features in Warehouse , PyPI's codebase, with the goal of helping make PyPI financially sustainable so it does not rely entirely on donations and sponsorships. PyPI organization accounts launched in 2025 as the first revenue stream, and this role will help expand that foundation. You will spend most of your time shipping featur
